summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently as requested. No close, merge, label, fix, or PR-opening mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PR lanes are disabled by the job. Seven ready-for-maintainer PRs require maintainer technical/merge judgment; one waiting-on-author PR is kept open without mutation; security-sensitive PRs #88442, #88709, and linked closed PR #80482 are routed to central security handling as scoped quarantine items.

Keep open rather than close: the PR is narrow but has unresolved author/review work and failed proof, while close and fix lanes are disabled.
Auth-provider behavior fix is ready for maintainer look, but final acceptance requires maintainer judgment and merge is disabled.
The dry-run/npm availability fix is plausible but broad enough to require maintainer technical review; no merge or fix mutation is allowed.
